lines.english: Lesson 33
lines.chinese: 第33课
lines.raw: Lesson 33 | 第33课

lines.english: Education
lines.chinese: 教育
lines.raw: Education | 教育

lines.english: Why is education democratic in bookless tribal societies?
lines.chinese: 为什么在没有书籍的部落社会中，教育是民主的？
lines.raw: Why is education democratic in bookless tribal societies? | 为什么在没有书籍的部落社会中，教育是民主的？

lines.english: Education is one of the key words of our time.
lines.chinese: 教育是我们这个时代的一个关键词。
lines.raw: Education is one of the key words of our time. | 教育是我们这个时代的一个关键词。

lines.english: A man without an education, many of us believe,
lines.chinese: 许多人认为，一个没有受过教育的人
lines.raw: A man without an education, many of us believe, | 许多人认为，一个没有受过教育的人

lines.english: is an unfortunate victim of adverse circumstances, deprived of one of the greatest twentieth-century opportunities.
lines.chinese: 是不幸境遇的受害者，被剥夺了20世纪最伟大的机会之一。
lines.raw: is an unfortunate victim of adverse circumstances, deprived of one of the greatest twentieth-century opportunities. | 是不幸境遇的受害者，被剥夺了20世纪最伟大的机会之一。

lines.english: Convinced of the importance of education, modern states 'invest' in institutions of learning to get back 'interest'
lines.chinese: 现代国家深信教育的重要性，因此“投资”于学习机构，以期“回报”
lines.raw: Convinced of the importance of education, modern states 'invest' in institutions of learning to get back 'interest' | 现代国家深信教育的重要性，因此“投资”于学习机构，以期“回报”

lines.english: in the form of a large group of enlightened young men and women who are potential leaders.
lines.chinese: 一大批开明的青年男女，他们是潜在的领导者。
lines.raw: in the form of a large group of enlightened young men and women who are potential leaders. | 一大批开明的青年男女，他们是潜在的领导者。

lines.english: Education, with its cycles of instruction so carefully worked out,
lines.chinese: 教育，有着精心设计的教学周期，
lines.raw: Education, with its cycles of instruction so carefully worked out, | 教育，有着精心设计的教学周期，

lines.english: punctuated by textbooks--those purchasable wells of wisdom--what would civilization be like without its benefits?
lines.chinese: 以教科书——那些可以购买的智慧源泉——作为点缀，如果没有它的益处，文明会是什么样子？
lines.raw: punctuated by textbooks--those purchasable wells of wisdom--what would civilization be like without its benefits? | 以教科书——那些可以购买的智慧源泉——作为点缀，如果没有它的益处，文明会是什么样子？

lines.english: So much is certain: that we would have doctors and preachers,
lines.chinese: 有一点是肯定的：我们会有医生和传教士，
lines.raw: So much is certain: that we would have doctors and preachers, | 有一点是肯定的：我们会有医生和传教士，

lines.english: lawyers and defendants marriages and births--but our spiritual outlook would be different.
lines.chinese: 律师和被告，婚姻和生育——但我们的精神观念会大相径庭。
lines.raw: lawyers and defendants marriages and births--but our spiritual outlook would be different. | 律师和被告，婚姻和生育——但我们的精神观念会大相径庭。

lines.english: We would lay less stress on 'facts and figures' and more on a good memory,
lines.chinese: 我们会更少强调“事实和数据”，而更多地关注良好的记忆力，
lines.raw: We would lay less stress on 'facts and figures' and more on a good memory, | 我们会更少强调“事实和数据”，而更多地关注良好的记忆力，

lines.english: on applied psychology, and on the capacity of a man to get along with his fellow-citizens.
lines.chinese: 关注应用心理学，以及一个人与同胞和睦相处的能力。
lines.raw: on applied psychology, and on the capacity of a man to get along with his fellow-citizens. | 关注应用心理学，以及一个人与同胞和睦相处的能力。

lines.english: If our educational system were fashioned after its bookless past we would have the most democratic form of 'college' imaginable.
lines.chinese: 如果我们的教育体系仿效其没有书籍的过去，我们就会拥有 imaginable 最民主的“大学”形式。
lines.raw: If our educational system were fashioned after its bookless past we would have the most democratic form of 'college' imaginable. | 如果我们的教育体系仿效其没有书籍的过去，我们就会拥有 imaginable 最民主的“大学”形式。

lines.english: Among tribal people all knowledge inherited by tradition is shared by all;
lines.chinese: 在部落民族中，所有通过传统继承的知识都由所有人共享；
lines.raw: Among tribal people all knowledge inherited by tradition is shared by all; | 在部落民族中，所有通过传统继承的知识都由所有人共享；

lines.english: it is taught to every member of the tribe so that in this respect everybody is equally equipped for life.
lines.chinese: 它被传授给部落的每一个成员，因此在这方面，每个人都同样具备了生活的能力。
lines.raw: it is taught to every member of the tribe so that in this respect everybody is equally equipped for life. | 它被传授给部落的每一个成员，因此在这方面，每个人都同样具备了生活的能力。

lines.english: It is the ideal condition of the 'equal start' which only our most progressive forms of modern education try to regain.
lines.chinese: 这是“平等起步”的理想条件，只有我们最进步的现代教育形式才试图重新获得。
lines.raw: It is the ideal condition of the 'equal start' which only our most progressive forms of modern education try to regain. | 这是“平等起步”的理想条件，只有我们最进步的现代教育形式才试图重新获得。

lines.english: In primitive cultures the obligation to seek and to receive the traditional instruction is binding to all.
lines.chinese: 在原始文化中，寻求和接受传统教育的义务对所有人都有约束力。
lines.raw: In primitive cultures the obligation to seek and to receive the traditional instruction is binding to all. | 在原始文化中，寻求和接受传统教育的义务对所有人都有约束力。

lines.english: There are no'illiterates' --if the term can be applied to peoples without a script--while our own compulsory school attendance became law in Germany in 1642,
lines.chinese: 没有“文盲”——如果这个词可以用来指没有文字的民族的话——而我们自己的义务入学制度于1642年在德国成为法律，
lines.raw: There are no'illiterates' --if the term can be applied to peoples without a script--while our own compulsory school attendance became law in Germany in 1642, | 没有“文盲”——如果这个词可以用来指没有文字的民族的话——而我们自己的义务入学制度于1642年在德国成为法律，

lines.english: in France in 1806, and in England in 1876 and is still nonexistent in a number of 'civilized' nations.
lines.chinese: 1806年在法国，1876年在英国，并且在一些“文明”国家仍然不存在。
lines.raw: in France in 1806, and in England in 1876 and is still nonexistent in a number of 'civilized' nations. | 1806年在法国，1876年在英国，并且在一些“文明”国家仍然不存在。

lines.english: This shows how long it was before we deemed it necessary to make sure
lines.chinese: 这表明我们花了多长时间才认为有必要确保
lines.raw: This shows how long it was before we deemed it necessary to make sure | 这表明我们花了多长时间才认为有必要确保

lines.english: that all our children could share in the knowledge accumulated by the 'happy few' during the past centuries.
lines.chinese: 我们的所有孩子都能分享过去几个世纪由“少数幸运儿”积累的知识。
lines.raw: that all our children could share in the knowledge accumulated by the 'happy few' during the past centuries. | 我们的所有孩子都能分享过去几个世纪由“少数幸运儿”积累的知识。

lines.english: Education in the wilderness is not a matter of monetary means.
lines.chinese: 荒野中的教育并非金钱问题。
lines.raw: Education in the wilderness is not a matter of monetary means. | 荒野中的教育并非金钱问题。

lines.english: All are entitled to an equal start.
lines.chinese: 所有人都有权获得平等的起步。
lines.raw: All are entitled to an equal start. | 所有人都有权获得平等的起步。

lines.english: There is none of the hurry which, in our society, often hampers the full development of a growing personality.
lines.chinese: 那里没有我们社会中常常阻碍一个成长中的人格充分发展的匆忙。
lines.raw: There is none of the hurry which, in our society, often hampers the full development of a growing personality. | 那里没有我们社会中常常阻碍一个成长中的人格充分发展的匆忙。

lines.english: There, a child grows up under the everpresent attention of his parents;
lines.chinese: 在那里，孩子在父母无时无刻的关怀下成长；
lines.raw: There, a child grows up under the everpresent attention of his parents; | 在那里，孩子在父母无时无刻的关怀下成长；

lines.english: therefore the jungles and the savannahs know of no 'juvenile delinquency'.
lines.chinese: 因此，丛林和热带草原上没有“青少年犯罪”。
lines.raw: therefore the jungles and the savannahs know of no 'juvenile delinquency'. | 因此，丛林和热带草原上没有“青少年犯罪”。

lines.english: No necessity of making a living away from home results in neglect of children, and no father is confronted with his inability to 'buy' an education for his child.
lines.chinese: 没有离家谋生的必要导致儿童被忽视，也没有父亲面临无法为孩子“购买”教育的困境。
lines.raw: No necessity of making a living away from home results in neglect of children, and no father is confronted with his inability to 'buy' an education for his child. | 没有离家谋生的必要导致儿童被忽视，也没有父亲面临无法为孩子“购买”教育的困境。
